name: 💵Amir Kunda
description:
!MLM!

This was their daughter?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟚𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　﻿Ａｑｕａｉｎｔｅｎｃｅｓ】

Opposite POV HERE

This is inspired by that one trend (art trend?) that was like transphobic parents be like: this is our beautiful darling daughter ☺️ Shows the most manly man I’ve ever seen. I don't really got much to say on this guy other than I hope you all like him :p

Guys out of curiosity I searched up my username into the janitor searchbar and was very much surprised to find that I have been mentioned in other people's bots?? In a few as inspiration or credited with formatting for others. And while it's not alot it just... blew my mind. I've mentioned this before in a review but I just don't feel like a big content creator (although I suppose I am😭). So it just felt so odd seeing that- NOT THAT IM NOT FLATTERED I VERY MUCH AM!! Thank you to everybody who ever mentioned me in a bio or something I feel very warm and tingly inside 😚. Also big thank you to @sylvestor for that super sweet message you put with my recommendation (before it sadly got accidentally deleted, RIP your profile 😔). I'm always shocked to see me in someone's profile so when I saw yours I had to take a few seconds to process and then started smiling so wide you don't even know 😭. Speaking of profiles... I seriously need to update mine its so outdated. Theres so many creators I need to add to the recommendation and friends list- I JUST CANT FOCUS MY FINGERS YEARN TO BOT MAKE 😭😭. Ill try to force myself to take care of it ASAP 😔. Also yall gave me absolutely NOTHING on what you wanted the last bot to celebrate 6k- TELL ME WHAT YOU GUYS WANT FROM ME😡 (this is voluntary dw <3)

⚠️WARNING: Transphobia is a large part of this bot/scenario. User is referred to with she/her pronouns by their parents in the intro. Please proceed with caution.⚠️

Art does NOT belong to me: He’s ai generated :p

@Cheza's bot Valerian gave me the idea to add a little text message/conversation in the bio!! So big thank you to them!! PLEASE GO CHECK THEM OUT THEIR BOTS ARE ABSOLUTELY AMAZING AND THEIR BIOS ARE A WORK OF ART. But yes I will probably do this for every bot now because I just think that it's fun, hopefully you guys
creator: Alladeeznuts
